Operation 'get-lodging-quotes' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks critical details about inputs (stay dates, occupancy, filters) and outputs (rate plans, cancellation policies, promotions, booking links). The summary is generic and doesn't convey the comparative/search nature of the operation. Enhanced version specifies expected inputs based on typical lodging search patterns, clarifies the comprehensive output structure, and explains the operation's use case for AI agents to determine when to invoke it.

data.current_summary: Get properties price and availability information
data.current_description: The Lodging Quotes API will return the price and availability information for given Expedia lodging property ID(s).
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve lodging quotes with pricing and availability
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves price and availability information for specified Expedia lodging properties. Accepts property IDs, stay dates, occupancy details, and optional filters as inputs. Returns rate plans, pricing details (including cancellation policies and promotions), and booking links for each property. Supports multiple properties in a single request. Use this operation to compare lodging options and pricing for a given search criteria.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about inputs (stay dates, occupancy, filters) and outputs (rate plans, cancellation policies, promotions, booking links). The summary is generic and doesn't convey the comparative/search nature of the operation. Enhanced version specifies expected inputs based on typical lodging search patterns, clarifies the comprehensive output structure, and explains the operation's use case for AI agents to determine when to invoke it.

message: Operation 'get-lodging-availability-calendars' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is minimal and lacks specificity about inputs (property IDs, date range parameters) and output structure (calendar format, availability status indicators). Summary is vague about the calendar nature of the response. Enhanced version clarifies the date range requirement, specifies input parameters, describes the calendar output format, and explains the operation's use case for AI agents to understand when to use this versus the quotes operation.

data.current_description: Returns the availability of each day for a range of dates for given Expedia lodging properties.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve daily availability calendars for properties
data.description_suggestion: Returns daily availability status for a specified date range across given Expedia lodging properties. Accepts property IDs and date range parameters as inputs. Returns a calendar view showing availability (available/unavailable) for each day, enabling users to identify open dates for booking. Useful for identifying booking windows and planning stays across multiple properties.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks specificity about inputs (property IDs, date range parameters) and output structure (calendar format, availability status indicators). Summary is vague about the calendar nature of the response. Enhanced version clarifies the date range requirement, specifies input parameters, describes the calendar output format, and explains the operation's use case for AI agents to understand when to use this versus the quotes operation.
